% Auto-generated PGFPlots figure for sinr_cdf_publication
% Requires: \usepackage{pgfplots,pgfplotstable,xcolor}
% Optional: \usepgfplotslibrary{groupplots}
\providecommand{\postprocessfigurewidth}{\linewidth}
\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}
\definecolor{CentralMassiveMimoColor}{HTML}{D4A017}
\definecolor{DistributedFixedColor}{HTML}{2F5D8A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableColor}{HTML}{CB3A2A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptTwoColor}{HTML}{1B9E77}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptThreeColor}{HTML}{7570B3}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
    width=\postprocessfigurewidth,
    height=0.62\postprocessfigurewidth,
    xlabel={SINR per user snapshot [dB]},
    ylabel={CDF},
    grid=major,
    legend pos=south east,
    xmin=-20,
  ]
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=CentralMassiveMimoColor, solid,each nth point=5] table[x=value_db,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/sinr_cdf_central_massive_mimo.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy1}
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedFixedColor, solid,each nth point=5] table[x=value_db,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/sinr_cdf_distributed_fixed.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy2}
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableColor, solid,each nth point=5] table[x=value_db,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/sinr_cdf_distributed_movable.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy3}
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableOptTwoColor, solid,each nth point=5] table[x=value_db,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/sinr_cdf_distributed_movable_optimization_2.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy4}
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableOptThreeColor, solid,each nth point=5] table[x=value_db,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/sinr_cdf_distributed_movable_optimization_3.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy5}
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
